{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Bow Sage
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Bow Sage]] is a specific type of user for the bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
